note: Passerellidae; clootl has the exact name (legacy key wrongly lumped it to Arremon torquatus)
Oriolidae; MalAvi mislabels the family as Corvidae, which forced a false epithet-stem match to Corvus brachyrhynchos. clootl spells it brachyrynchus (one h)
Tyrannidae; eBird moved Phaeomyias into Nesotriccus. The Howard & Moore synonym 'Phaeomyias murina' is ambiguous (also on N. tumbezanus/maranonicus), so it must be set by hand to N. murinus
Trochilidae; Green-crowned Woodnymph, treated by eBird/Clements within Crowned Woodnymph T. colombica. Without this the family-pool stem match wrongly hit Myrtis fanny (a woodstar)
